name: hansharhoff-skills
description: Personal Claude Code skills marketplace by Hans Harhoff Andersen

plugins.name: teach-tech
plugins.description: Interactive technology teaching sessions — guides you through new technologies with explanations, diagrams, and hands-on exercises

plugins.name: repo-cleanup
plugins.description: Audit and clean up a repository: find typos, inconsistencies, outdated references, dead code, failing tests, type errors, linter issues, and documentation gaps

plugins.name: spec-driven-workflow
plugins.description: Iterate code against a spec maintained in a separate location. Snapshot-based diff drives each iteration's work plan; bookkeeping (status, blocked items, happy path) lives in the code repo's spec/working folder.
